hero.headline: Run your entire business.
hero.subheading: Finance, CRM, inventory, HR, and payments — unified in one cloud platform. Built for teams that want to scale.
hero.trust_line: ✓ No credit card required ✓ Your own cloud URL ✓ Setup in minutes

value_prop.one_source_desc: Every transaction, every customer, every report — connected and up-to-date.
value_prop.managed_cloud_desc: No servers to manage, no backups to schedule, no infrastructure to maintain.
value_prop.multi_company_desc: Manage one company or 20. User permissions, data isolation, and consolidation — all automatic.

features.title: Platform Capabilities
features.subtitle: One platform. Every function your business depends on.
features.finance_desc: Invoicing, expense tracking, automated bank reconciliation, and real-time P&L — built for day-to-day finance teams.
features.sales_desc: Pipeline management, quotations, customer portal, and automated follow-ups to close more deals, faster.
features.inventory_desc: Real-time stock tracking, purchase orders, multiple warehouses, and replenishment rules — all connected to your sales and finance.
features.hr_desc: Employee directory, recruitment pipelines, attendance, and leave management in one place.
features.payments_desc: Accept and reconcile payments directly inside Sajet. Powered by Stripe — no external dashboards needed.
features.reports_desc: Customizable dashboards and automated reports across every module. Make decisions with data, not guesses.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: From sign-up to productive in four steps.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Pick a plan, enter your company details — takes 90 seconds.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Database, subdomain, and cloud infrastructure — configured automatically in under 2 minutes.
how_it_works.step3_desc: You'll receive your access credentials and a direct link to your private dashboard.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Invite users, install additional modules, and start working — all from day one.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple, transparent pricing — no hidden fees.
pricing.all_prices_usd: All prices in USD. Taxes may apply. Cancel anytime.

partners.title: Partner Program
partners.subtitle: Grow with us — and earn while your clients scale.
partners.description: Join the Sajet partner ecosystem. Whether you're an accountant, a systems integrator, or a technology consultant — there's a tier for you.
partners.recurring_desc: Earn on every subscription you bring in — monthly or annual. Your revenue grows as your clients grow.
partners.white_label_desc: Show your brand, your colors, your domain. Sajet powers the back-end; your clients see your identity.
partners.support_desc: Partner-only Slack channel, priority tickets, and co-branded onboarding materials.

footer.tagline: Made with care for growing businesses worldwide.

accountants.headline: Manage every client.
accountants.subheading: Sajet gives accounting professionals a single dashboard to oversee all client companies — financials, documents, and reporting — without juggling multiple logins.
accountants.problem: The old way vs. the Sajet way
accountants.before_logins: Logging into 6 different client portals every morning
accountants.after_logins: One dashboard for every client — real-time financials, single sign-on
accountants.before_month_end: Month-end scramble: exporting CSVs, copy-pasting, reconciling
accountants.after_month_end: Automated consolidation, bank-feed sync, one-click trial balance
accountants.before_status: Clients call you for invoice status — you don't know either
accountants.after_status: Live AR/AP visibility + client self-service portal
accountants.capabilities_subtitle: Everything you need to serve clients efficiently.
accountants.multi_client_desc: See all your client companies in one view. Switch between tenants instantly.
accountants.reconciliation_desc: Bank feeds, invoice matching, and journal entries — connected and automated.
accountants.reporting_desc: Cross-client P&L, balance sheets, and cash flow — export-ready for tax season.
accountants.documents_desc: Receipts, invoices, contracts — uploaded by clients, organized by you.
accountants.roles_desc: Read-only, read-write, or full access — per client, per team member.
accountants.sync_desc: Every transaction updates instantly across modules. No batch processing delays.
accountants.partnership_subtitle: Choose how you want to work with us.
accountants.referral_desc: Send clients our way and earn commissions — no platform management required.
accountants.managed_desc: Full access to manage your clients' Sajet environments. White-label available.
accountants.enterprise_desc: For large accounting firms needing dedicated infrastructure and SLAs.
accountants.faq1_q: Is there a cost for accountants to use Sajet?
accountants.faq1_a: Referral partners pay nothing. Managed and Enterprise partners may have optional add-ons, but the core dashboard is included when your clients subscribe to Sajet.
accountants.faq2_q: Can I migrate my clients from QuickBooks / Xero?
accountants.faq2_a: Yes. We provide assisted migration tools and data import wizards. Our onboarding team can help with complex migrations at no extra cost for Managed partners.
accountants.faq3_a: You retain dashboard access to their historical data for 90 days. Commissions adjust automatically. No penalties for you.
accountants.faq4_a: Not at all. The accountant dashboard is designed for finance professionals, not developers. Everything is point-and-click.
accountants.faq5_q: Can my team members access the dashboard too?
accountants.faq5_a: Absolutely. You can invite team members with role-based permissions (read-only, read-write, full) per client.
accountants.ready_cta: Ready to simplify how you serve your clients?
accountants.cta_desc: Join accounting firms that manage all their clients from one platform. 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

final_cta.headline: Ready to run your business
final_cta.description: Join hundreds of companies that ditched the spreadsheet chaos. Your 14-day free trial starts in 90 seconds.

seo.title: SAJET ERP — Modern Enterprise Resource Planning for Latin America
seo.description: Affordable, cloud-based ERP software for SMBs in Latin America. Finance, Sales, Inventory, HR — all in one platform. Start your 14-day free trial.
seo.keywords: ERP, enterprise resource planning, business software, Latin America, cloud ERP, accounting software
seo.og_title: SAJET ERP — Run Your Business From One Place
seo.og_description: Cloud-based ERP built for Latin American businesses. Multi-company, multi-tenant. Start free today.
